action.reasoning: Observation: baseline CLIP ViT-B/16 reached val balanced accuracy 0.746 but hidden-test balanced accuracy is only 0.522, with especially poor recall on empty, bobcat, bird, and squirrel. Analysis: the current recipe likely overfits source-domain backgrounds despite class balancing; camera-trap DG usually benefits from stronger spatial/appearance augmentation and test-time augmentation, while keeping the strong pretrained backbone. We already have a working pipeline and short iteration time, so the best next step is an incremental improvement rather than a rewrite: add RandomErasing and slightly stronger augmentation, use label smoothing, save EMA-free but stronger checkpoint selection on val balanced accuracy, and add horizontal-flip TTA in predict.py. Then train a bit longer now that runtime is known and submit eval. Decision: patch train.py and predict.py accordingly, train for 6 epochs, smoke test on val, and submit the new checkpoint.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 6 --checkpoint_path checkpoints/aug_tta.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/aug_tta.pt --output smoke_val.json
